original_query: SELECT "t6"."ENAME" FROM (SELECT "JOB" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "ENAME", "JOB" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "ENAME", "JOB") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."JOB" GROUP BY "t6"."ENAME"

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced complex subqueries and LEFT JOIN with a simpler semi-join using IN clause
Removed unnecessary GROUP BY clauses and used DISTINCT to eliminate duplicates
Simplified the query structure by directly filtering with a subquery condition
